decisions: Plan's change_log INSERT trigger SQL was incorrect — referenced non-existent columns (id via hex(randomblob), created_at). Plan named test helper sync_test_data.dart but actual schema bootstrap is sqlite_test_helper.dart. sync_test_data.dart has no CREATE TABLE — left untouched.
Added signature_tables.dart to schema barrel export, not a separate import in database_service.dart, matching CoreTables/SyncEngineTables pattern.
Added mime_type default to schema_verifier _columnTypes for drift detection beyond plan's listed columns.
